$comment: Inputs for Update-FoundryTokenReport.ps1. Mirrors the 'Model info' and 'Discount and adjustments' sections of the report. Resource NAMES are NOT hardcoded: the runbook derives Resource Group + Subscription from these settings (same rules as infra-project.yml / CmnAIfactoryNaming.bicep) and then discovers the Foundry account, Log Analytics workspace and App Insights by type. Override at runtime via runbook parameters.

naming._comment: Concat rules from .env (root) + infra-project.yml + CmnAIfactoryNaming.bicep. Project RG = {aifactoryPrefix}{projectPrefix}project{projectNumber}-{locationShort}-{env}{aifactorySuffix}{projectSuffix}. Common RG = {aifactoryPrefix}{vnetResourceGroupBase}-{locationShort}-{env}{aifactorySuffix}. Log Analytics lives in the Common RG (la-cmn-...).
